title: Careers at Health Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Careers at Health Canada
- Why Work At Health Canada
- Follow us on YouTube
- Contact Us - Careers at Health Canada
- See our video gallery
Health Canada recruits doctors, nurses , and scientists, as well non-scientific professionals in many fields including IT, public administration, human resources, and communications.
In addition, Health Canada employs students in a variety of program areas across the department.
We are proud to announce that once again this year, Health Canada has been named one of Canada’s Top Employers for Young People by Mediacorp. This award recognizes the department as one of the nation’s best workplaces for young people just starting their careers.
Health Canada has also been named one of Canada's Best Diversity Employers thanks to its progressive programs and organizational culture that promotes diversity at all levels.
